optimizations: noise(): 4 trig ops -> 2 (removed 0.5-weighted sin(3.1x) and cos(1.9y) secondary terms)
noise() signature: added t param, uses mod(t, 100.0) internally to prevent float precision drift
edgeFade: 4 smoothstep multiplications -> 1 radial smoothstep on length(vUv - 0.5)
side: THREE.DoubleSide -> THREE.FrontSide (fog viewed from above, halves rasterization)

perf_analysis.geometry_note: PlaneGeometry(180,180,1,1) already minimal -- no vertex optimization needed
perf_analysis.target_gpu: GTX 1060 (tile-based rasterizer benefits from both fragment and rasterization cuts)

regression_checks.fog_name_preserved: fog_plane (update() lookup by name still works)
regression_checks.visual_appearance: slightly less dense, same animation. Edge fade now circular instead of rectangular -- aesthetically equivalent.
regression_checks.false_positive_QA: DoubleSide grep flagged JSDoc comment on line 142, not code. Actual code on line 185 is FrontSide.
